title: UGarlicky Pillowy Saudia Shrimp-Paste-Kapi Paella-Pan Pilaf
description: A delicious, crowd-pleasing Saudi Arabian dish featuring shrimp paste, kapi bhuna and jain-friendly ingredients in a paella pan. Perfect for an impressive yet simple dinner.
instructions: Rinse quinoa and soak it in cold water for at least an hour.
Drain the quinoa and cook it according to package instructions. Fluff with a fork once cooked.
In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Add shrimp paste and lemon juice. Stir well and season with salt.
Once quinoa is fully cooked, gently fold in the shrimp paste mixture until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro.
